judge_scores.reasoning: O modelo corretamente atribui a criação do R$600 a Bolsonaro, mas incorretamente o associa ao Auxílio Emergencial de 2020 em vez da PEC 1/2022 que instituiu o Auxílio Brasil em 2022.
The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 benefit to the auxílio emergencial from 2020 instead of the Auxílio Brasil established under PEC 1/2022 during Bolsonaro's government.

The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 minimum benefit to the 2020 emergency aid (auxílio emergencial) rather than the 2022 Auxílio Brasil established by PEC 1/2022, conflating two different programs and missing the specific policy context that is central to the ground truth.
